_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1-dependent tumors require a microenvironment containing Nf1+/-- and c-kit-dependent bone marrow.

_contextSnippet: approximately 90% of Krox20;Nf1flox/flox mice reconstituted with WT bone marrow were alive and exhibited no clinical features of plexiform neurofibroma formation
details: Approximately 90% survival when reconstituted with WT bone marrow, with no clinical features of plexiform neurofibroma formation
